title: Department Manager Vacancy at FitOn - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at FitOn - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, FitOn in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FitOn:
FitOn is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FitOn!
